summary: Iteration 9 - Complete testing of Charge Sheet Fusion and Media Forensic features. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly with proper UI elements and dual-wing navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Login with TEST123/test123 successful (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials rejected (401)
Backend: POST /api/charge-sheet-fusion/process - Rejects request with no documents (400)
Backend: POST /api/charge-sheet-fusion/process - Rejects request with missing required fields (422)
Backend: POST /api/charge-sheet-fusion/process - Processes DOCX file and returns charge sheet (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/forensic/analyze - Analyzes PNG image and returns verdict REAL/AI_GENERATED/DEEP_FAKE + confidence (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/forensic/analyze - Analyzes JPEG image and returns verdict + confidence (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/forensic/analyze - Rejects unsupported file types (400)
Backend: POST /api/forensic/analyze - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: API root endpoint accessible
Frontend: Login page loads with Officer ID and Password fields
Frontend: Login with TEST123/test123 redirects to Dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard displays dual-wing navigation (WING 1: ADMIN, WING 2: FORENSIC LAB)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Charge Sheet Fusion with NEW badge
Frontend: Dashboard shows Media Forensic with NEW badge
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion page loads with multi-upload interface
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion - Telugu Petition upload visible
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion - Crime Details Form upload visible
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion - Case Diary Part-II upload visible
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion - Police Station, District, FIR Number inputs visible
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion - 4-step workflow (Upload Documents, AI Fusion, Review & Edit, Export)
Frontend: Charge Sheet Fusion - Generate Charge Sheet with AI button visible
Frontend: Media Forensic page loads with upload and analysis sections
Frontend: Media Forensic - Upload Media section visible
Frontend: Media Forensic - Analysis Result section visible
Frontend: Media Forensic - Supported file types (JPG, PNG, MP4, MOV, AVI) displayed
Frontend: Media Forensic - Forensic Analysis Technology info visible
Frontend: Media Forensic - GAN-generated and deepfake detection capabilities mentioned
Frontend: Navigation between modules works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Charge Sheet Fusion API correctly extracts text from DOCX files using python-docx library
Media Forensic API returns new verdict format: REAL, AI_GENERATED, DEEP_FAKE with confidence percentage
JWT authentication properly implemented across all endpoints
Frontend correctly handles new verdict format and displays appropriate UI
Dual-wing navigation (WING 1: ADMIN, WING 2: FORENSIC LAB) properly implemented in sidebar and dashboard

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly with proper UI elements)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user TEST123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Charge Sheet Fusion and Media Forensic features fully tested. Charge Sheet Fusion supports multi-document upload (Telugu Petition, CDF, Case Diary) with text extraction from DOCX/DOC/PDF. Media Forensic returns verdict (REAL/AI_GENERATED/DEEP_FAKE) with confidence percentage. Both features accessible via dual-wing navigation system.

mocked_apis_list: CCTV Search AI analysis - Returns mock results (beta feature)
Media Forensic analysis - Uses heuristic scoring based on file metadata (not actual AI deepfake detection model)
